rows.label: qev065204_MSG0001
rows.name:
I thought I smelled something strange...
It seems livestock has wandered into our castle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hehe, but older sister,
it seems this livestock is the one who took Mother away, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ahahaha! They came here so casually!
They must be dying to be tormented![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see... As expected of lives born solely to be treated
as tools and our servants.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0005
rows.name:
Coming forward to atone for your sins is an admirable attitude.
In consideration of that attitude today...
We shall grant you the special privilege of being killed by us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0006
rows.name: ...Is everyone ready?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0007
rows.name:
Yes, let us finish this quickly.
It will be time for tea soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0008
rows.name:
A moderate workout before snack time!
Alright, I'm going to go wild![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Now, here we go.
Regret being born as a lower lifeform...
and disappear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0019
rows.name:
We have ruled over the lower lifeforms of various planets
alongside Mother Fortun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0020
rows.name:
That is to say, it is the providence of the universe,
and the happiest way of being for livestock, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hey... Can you truly not understand something
as simple as this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_JNK0010
rows.name: Argue

rows.label: qev065204_SEL0011
rows.name:
Appeal that you are going to realize a world
where all are equal.

rows.label: qev065204_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065204_SEL0021
rows.name: Criticize that you cannot understand it at all.

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0022
rows.name:
Haha! Such a thing as equality does not exist in this world
in the slightest![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0023
rows.name:
I shall teach you that right now.
You will be the absolute weaklings for all eternity![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0024
rows.name:
That is exactly why you are lower lifeforms!
Livestock cannot understand anything unless their backsides are whipped![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Then we shall teach you that in a way that is easy
for you to understand as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0026
rows.name: Hehe... I can no longer hear Mother's voice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Say, [ST:playername ].
Let me ask you one last thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0028
rows.name:
It is true that we have deceived you
and taken many lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0029
rows.name:
But you see, that is our mission.
Within this finite universe, the selection of life
is the duty of superior lifeforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0030
rows.name:
Powerless, foolish, and arrogant livestock...
Do you truly believe Earthlings have the worth to continue living,
even if it means eliminating superior lives like ours?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev065204_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod strongly.

rows.label: qev065204_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev065204_SEL0041
rows.name:
Declare that there is no superiority or inferiority
in the value of all lives.

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see...
That is why you cannot be saved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0032
rows.name:
Fools...
That is why you cannot be saved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065204_MSG0033
rows.name:
This time, with our power...
We shall show you the value of your lives![ST:wait ]
